question: Which orders have at least 2 products on it? List the order id and date.
sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.date_order_placed AS date FROM Orders o JOIN Order_Items i ON o.order_id = i.order_id GROUP BY o.order_id HAVING COUNT(i.product_id) >= 2;

semantic.reason: 缺少关键的过滤条件（需统计产品数量≥2）和聚合操作（如COUNT），仅分组无法实现筛选逻辑
